cartridges_very_low_65546.body:
Cartridges that are very low might be sufficiently depleted to cause poor print quality. Select OK to continue printing or cancel the print job at the printer.

You might want to have replacements available to install when print quality is no longer acceptable.

Cartridges can be recycled. Visit www.hp.com/recycle to learn more about HP's recycling programs.

used_or_counterfeit_cartridges_detected_.body:
The contents of the Original HP cartridges have been depleted.
This can occur when the cartridge prints more than expected.
If you have just installed the indicated cartridges and you believe they are new, Original HP cartridges, click Yes. Otherwise, click No.

used_or_counterfeit_cartridges_installed.body:
You have identified the indicated cartridges as new, Original HP cartridges. However, the printer has detected that these cartridges are not new, Original HP cartridges. The contents of the Original HP cartridges may have been depleted.

NOTICES: 
* Information about cartridge levels will not be available.
* The HP cartridge warranty does not cover counterfeit cartridges or cartridges with non-HP contents.
* The HP printer warranty does not cover repairs or service due to use of counterfeit cartridges or cartridges with non-HP contents.
* HP does not guarantee the quality or reliability of counterfeit cartridges or non-HP contents in HP cartridges.

cartridge_usedorcounterfeit_question_con.body:
You have identified the indicated cartridges as new, Original HP cartridges. However, the printer has detected that these cartridges are not new, Original HP cartridges. The contents of the Original HP cartridges may have been depleted.

NOTICES: 
* Information about cartridge levels will not be available.
* The HP cartridge warranty does not cover counterfeit cartridges or cartridges with non-HP contents.
* The HP printer warranty does not cover repairs or service due to use of counterfeit cartridges or cartridges with non-HP contents.
* HP does not guarantee the quality or reliability of counterfeit cartridges or non-HP contents in HP cartridges.

counterfeit_or_used_cartridges_identifie.body:
You have identified the indicated cartridges as new, Original HP cartridges. However, the printer has detected that these cartridges are not new, Original HP cartridges and might be counterfeit.

If these cartridges are newly-installed and were sold to you as new, Original HP cartridges, contact the store where they were purchased.

If you believe you purchased Original HP cartridges, visit the HP Anti-Counterfeit website (www.hp.com/go/anticounterfeit) for more information or to report fraud.

To continue using the indicated cartridges, click Continue.

used_or_counterfeit_cartridges_detected_.body:
The contents of the Original HP cartridges have been depleted.
This can occur when the cartridge prints more than expected.
If you have just installed the indicated cartridges and you believe they are new, Original HP cartridges, click Yes. Otherwise, click No.

counterfeit_or_used_cartridges_identifie.body:
You have identified the indicated cartridges as new, Original HP cartridges. However, the printer has detected that these cartridges are not new, Original HP cartridges and might be counterfeit.

If these cartridges are newly-installed and were sold to you as new, Original HP cartridges, contact the store where they were purchased.

If you believe you purchased Original HP cartridges, visit the HP Anti-Counterfeit website (www.hp.com/go/anticounterfeit) for more information or to report fraud.

To continue using the indicated cartridges, click Continue.

For problems with cartridges obtained from HP Instant Ink, contact HP Instant Ink Support.

used_or_counterfeit_cartridges_installed.body:
You have identified the indicated cartridges as new, Original HP cartridges. However, the printer has detected that these cartridges are not new, Original HP cartridges. The contents of the Original HP cartridges may have been depleted.

NOTICES: 
* Information about cartridge levels will not be available.
* The HP cartridge warranty does not cover counterfeit cartridges or cartridges with non-HP contents.
* The HP printer warranty does not cover repairs or service due to use of counterfeit cartridges or cartridges with non-HP contents.
* HP does not guarantee the quality or reliability of counterfeit cartridges or non-HP contents in HP cartridges.

To continue using this cartridge, click OK.
For problems with cartridges obtained from HP Instant Ink, contact HP Instant Ink Support.

cartridges_very_low_65764.body:
You may replace the cartridge now or wait until it is causing poor print quality.

Since your printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink, you should have a replacement cartridge available or a delivery coming soon. 
Please visit HP Instant Ink for information about your shipments.

cartridges_very_low_65776.body:
You may replace the cartridges now or wait until print quality is no longer acceptable. Select OK to continue printing or cancel the print job at the printer.

Contact HP Instant Ink if you don't have replacement cartridges.

cartridges_very_low_66241.body:
Cartridges that are very low might be sufficiently depleted to cause poor print quality. Select OK to continue printing or cancel the print job at the printer.

You might want to have replacements available to install when print quality is no longer acceptable.

If you have an HP+ printer, it requires Original HP cartridges.

If your printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink, you should already have a replacement cartridge. Sign in to your HP account on the home screen to check your status.

Cartridges can be recycled. Visit www.hp.com/recycle to learn more about HP's recycling programs.

used_or_refilled_cartridges_installed_66.body:
The printer has identified the indicated cartridges as having been refilled or remanufactured. The contents of the Original HP cartridges may have been depleted.

NOTICES: 
* Information about cartridge levels will not be available.
* The HP cartridge warranty does not cover non-HP cartridges or cartridges with non-HP contents.
* The HP printer warranty does not cover repairs or service due to use of non-HP cartridges or cartridges with non-HP contents.
* HP does not guarantee the quality or reliability of non-HP contents in HP cartridges.

The printer has identified the indicated cartridges as having been refilled or remanufactured. The contents of the Original HP cartridges may have been depleted.

NOTICES:
* Information about cartridge levels will not be available.
* The HP cartridge warranty does not cover non-HP cartridges or cartridges with non-HP contents.
* The HP printer warranty does not cover repairs or service due to use of non-HP cartridges or cartridges with non-HP contents.
* HP does not guarantee the quality or reliability of non-HP contents in HP cartridges.

To continue using this cartridge, click OK.
For problems with cartridges obtained from HP Instant Ink, contact HP Instant Ink Support.

printer_supply_upgrade_available_65549.body:
The indicated cartridge can only be used to upgrade one printer. Select OK to use it on this printer. 

If you do not wish to proceed with the supply upgrade for this printer, replace the cartridge.

printer_supply_upgrade_available_65677.body:
The indicated cartridge can only be used to upgrade one printer. Select OK to use it on this printer. 

If you do not wish to proceed with the supply upgrade for this printer, replace the cartridge.

hp_instant_ink_cartridges_installed_6577.body: Please complete HP Instant Ink enrollment at HP Instant Ink.

used_or_counterfeit_cartridges_detected_.body:
If you believe these are new, Original HP cartridges, click Yes. Otherwise, click No. 

If you have an HP+ printer, it requires Original HP cartridges.

If your printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink, you should already have a replacement cartridge. Sign in to your HP account at www.hpsmart.com for more information.

The printer has identified the indicated cartridges as having been refilled or remanufactured. The contents of the Original HP cartridges may have been depleted.

NOTICES: 
* Information about cartridge levels will not be available.

Cartridges_Very_Low_65848.body:
Cartridges that are very low on ink may be sufficiently depleted to cause poor print quality.
HP recommends you have a replacement available to install when print quality is no longer acceptable.

tanks_very_low_66018.body: The indicated tanks are very low. You may fill the tanks now or wait until prompted.

align_the_printheads_65569.body: For best print quality, align your new cartridges or printheads.

empty_cartridges_65613.body:
The contents of the indicated, Original HP cartridge have been depleted or the cartridge might be empty. 

Replace the cartridge or click OK to use it.

NOTICE: Only use the indicated cartridge if you are sure it has not been depleted. Printing with a depleted cartridge causes air to enter the printing system, which can cause poor print quality. Also, to try to recover from this condition, the printer performs major cartridge servicing. This servicing shortens the life of the cartridge.

cartridges_very_low_65672.body:
The indicated cartridges are very low and will be depleted soon.

While you do not have to replace the cartridges now, HP recommends you have a replacement available to install when cartridges are depleted and will need to be replaced.

When you are ready to remove your cartridge, you can find information on how to recycle it at www.hp.com/recycle.

hp_instant_ink_cartridges_installed_6593.body: Your trial has ended. To continue using these cartridges, enroll at www.hpinstantink.com/enroll or insert non-HP Instant Ink cartridges.

cartridges_very_low_65848.body:
Cartridges that are very low on ink may be sufficiently depleted to cause poor print quality.

HP recommends you have a replacement available to install when print quality is no longer acceptable.

tanks_very_low_66332.body:
The indicated tanks are very low. Your printer will stop printing when the tanks are depleted. HP recommends that you fill the tanks now or you can wait until prompted.

If your printer is enrolled in HP Instant Ink, you should already have a replacement bottle. Sign in to your HP account on the home screen to check your status.

cartridges_very_low_66085.body:
The indicated cartridges are very low. 

 The actual life remaining might vary and these cartridges do not have to be replaced now.  You might want to have replacements available to install when print quality is no longer acceptable. 

 Cartridges can be recycled. Visit www.hp.com/recycle to learn more about HP's recycling programs. 

 Note: If the Very Low Behavior setting has been customer-configured to "Prompt", either replace the cartridges or see the control panel to continue using the installed cartridges.

printhead_used_with_non_hp_ink_66413.body:
HP cannot guarantee the quality or reliability of printheads with non-HP contents.

Any printer repair required as a result of using non-HP ink is not covered under warranty.

cartridges_very_low_66515.body:
The indicated cartridges are very low and will be depleted soon.

While you do not have to replace the cartridges now, HP recommends you have a replacement available to install when cartridges are depleted and will need to be replaced.

When you are ready to remove your cartridge, you can find information on how to recycle it at www.hp.com/recycle.

cartridge_altered_66562.body: See the printer control panel for more information.

calibration_required_66495.body:
Alignment improves print quality.

This process uses ink and paper. Make sure that plain, white paper is loaded in the printer.
